title: 7 Herbal Creams For Rheumatoid Arthritis
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams contains active constituents like glycyrrhetic acid and flavonoids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and pain in the joints affected by rheumatoid arthritis. Glycyrrhetic acid blocks the production of a hormone called cortisol, which contributes to inflammation.
